description: Strings that have been retired from V1 product surface. CI lint guard (apps/web/scripts/lint-retired-strings.mjs) fails any PR that re-introduces these in apps/web/app/**. Source: CLAUDE.md decision log + 2026-05-22 10-sweep drift audit.

retired_strings.reason: Souvenir reel iteration retired in V1.5→V1 promotion (CLAUDE.md row 423). Surfaced live on /features 8 days post-retirement per Sweep 5 drift audit.
Not in canonical SKU table; never shipped. Re-appeared on /features per Sweep 5 drift audit.

Superseded by Bespoke Monogram (iteration 0037). CLAUDE.md 2026-05-14 row. Live SKU code 'custom_monogram_pack' still exists in service_catalog and is referenced by the Panood setup page — that surface is allow-listed pending a separate spec-vs-code reconciliation ticket.
Route doesn't exist; was primary CTA on /features per snapshot drift #1 (Live_Site_Snapshot_2026-05-18). Use href="/signup" instead.
